mapper.sql: w.id, w.level_id, w.word, w.phonetic, w.meaning, w.example, w.example_meaning, w.audio_url, w.sort, w.status, w.create_time, w.update_time, l.name AS level_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_word w LEFT JOIN t_word_level l ON w.level_id = l.id WHERE w.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM t_word w LEFT JOIN t_word_level l ON w.level_id = l.id WHERE w.level_id = #{levelId} AND w.status = 1 ORDER BY w.sort ASC

SELECT FROM t_word w LEFT JOIN t_word_level l ON w.level_id = l.id WHERE 1=1
AND (w.word LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR w.meaning LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND w.level_id = #{levelId}
ORDER BY w.sort ASC, w.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_word (level_id, word, phonetic, meaning, example, example_meaning, audio_url, sort, status) VALUES (#{levelId}, #{word}, #{phonetic}, #{meaning}, #{example}, #{exampleMeaning}, #{audioUrl}, #{sort}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_word WHERE level_id = #{levelId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_word WHERE status = 1
